description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a compact, utilitarian design, featuring a matte black finish and a robust, squared-off slide. The grip is ergonomically contoured, appearing to be made of a polymer material with a slightly textured surface for improved handling. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement and possibly accommodating gloved use. The slide has subtle serrations at the rear for easier racking, and the barrel is of standard length, with no visible threading or compensator. There are no prominent external markings or engravings visible on the slide, giving the weapon a minimalist appearance. The magazine base is flush with the grip, lacking any extension or flaring, and the overall build suggests a focus on reliability and practicality.
description: A compact, matte black semi-automatic handgun with a textured polymer grip, squared slide, and flush magazine base. The design is minimalist and utilitarian, with no visible external markings.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the handgun, including the contoured grip, squared slide, and flush magazine base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the width of the grip and slide, as well as the rear sight and back of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, revealing the slide serrations, trigger guard, and grip texture from the other side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the barrel opening, front sight, and the overall width of the slide and frame.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a gentle curve to fit the palm, constructed from a matte black polymer material. Its surface features a subtle, fine stippling pattern for enhanced traction, and the backstrap appears slightly arched for comfort. There are no visible finger grooves, logos, or embellishments, giving it a clean, functional look. The grip seamlessly integrates with the frame, and the base is flush with the magazine floorplate.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing a sturdy enclosure for the trigger. It is smooth with no visible undercuts or squared-off edges, and there are no integrated accessories or texturing. The size is ample, likely accommodating gloved fingers, and the design is simple and utilitarian.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, with a smooth, unadorned exterior and no visible threading, porting, or compensator. The muzzle is circular and clean, with no external markings or fluting, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unembellished, with only subtle wear and a matte finish.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extension, beveling, or flaring. There are no finger rests, logos, or texturing visible, contributing to the minimalist and streamlined appearance.
